title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud's low-code guide enables small teams to build AI applications without extensive AI expertise by leveraging corporate data, Cloud SQL, AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, and Gemini for natural language interfaces, hybrid search, and recommendations. The approach auto-generates code to rapidly deploy intelligent features in minutes.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through a low-code approach for small teams to build AI applications without deep AI expertise. It covers using corporate data with Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, plus Gemini, to add natural language interfaces, hybrid search, and recommendations. The key takeaway is that the workflow auto-generates code to deploy these intelligent features in minutes, lowering the barrier for teams with limited resources.
